EN.Sandbox_BetterPushMinStrengthLevel_toolt: The player Strength level at which the minimum push chance applies.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushMaxStrengthLevel_toolt: The player Strength level at which the maximum push chance applies.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushMinChance_tooltip: The base chance to trigger the domino push effect when at or below the minimum strength.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushMaxChance_tooltip: The maximum chance to trigger the domino push effect when at or above the maximum strength.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushMinZombies_tooltip: The base number of zombies in the domino chain knocked down when at minimum strength.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushMaxZombies_tooltip: The maximum number of zombies in the domino chain knocked down when at maximum strength.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushLineDistance_tooltip: How close zombies must be to each other (front to back) to continue falling in the chain.
EN.Sandbox_BetterPushLineWidth_tooltip: How wide the lateral tolerance is when finding the next zombie in the domino chain.
